❯ Create a file .claude/agents/test-agent.md with just the line: # Test Agent

  ⎿  User rejected write to .claude/agents/test-agent.md
      1 # Test Agent

❯ Please edit sample.txt and change Hello World to Hello Kovito

  Read 1 file (ctrl+o to expand)

● Update(sample.txt)
